title: noronhia candicans
intro: Noronhia candicans, also known as the Bois de Rose, is a tropical flowering plant native to the island of Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Noronhia candicans include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving pain. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a tea or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
